global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with various graphic elements and text promoting travel offers.
global.main_message: Promoting travel destinations at a low price with a call to action.

elements.label: orange background
elements.description: A solid orange background fills the entire canvas, providing a warm and inviting base.

elements.label: main graphic area
elements.description: A large rectangular area in the center with rounded edges, featuring a light color that contrasts with the background.

elements.label: secondary graphic area
elements.description: Another large rectangular area with rounded edges, positioned slightly lower than the first, also in a light color.

elements.label: additional graphic area
elements.description: A smaller rectangular area with rounded edges, placed below the second graphic area, maintaining the light color theme.

elements.label: small graphic area
elements.description: A smaller rectangular area with rounded edges, located towards the top center, contrasting with the background.

elements.label: graphic element
elements.description: A medium-sized rectangular area with rounded edges, positioned slightly lower and to the right of the previous elements.

elements.label: small circular graphic
elements.description: A small circular graphic element located towards the center, adding visual interest.

elements.label: medium circular graphic
elements.description: A medium-sized circular graphic element positioned slightly lower and to the right of the previous circular graphic.

elements.label: small circular graphic
elements.description: Another small circular graphic element located towards the bottom center, complementing the other graphics.

elements.label: small circular graphic
elements.description: A small circular graphic element positioned towards the bottom left, balancing the composition.

elements.label: small rectangular graphic
elements.description: A small rectangular graphic element located towards the bottom center, adding to the overall design.

elements.label: small circular graphic
elements.description: A small circular graphic element located towards the bottom right, completing the visual arrangement.

elements.label: small circular graphic
elements.description: Another small circular graphic element positioned towards the bottom left, enhancing the design.

elements.label: main offer text
elements.description: Bold white text at the bottom, prominently displaying the offer with a clear call to action.
elements.text_content: destinations €9.99 Try for free Hotels Flights one tap

elements.label: headline text
elements.description: Large white text in the center, conveying a dream-like theme with a captivating word.

elements.label: advertiser logo
elements.description: A small logo positioned at the top left, featuring the brand name in a simple font.

elements.label: sale badge
elements.description: A small badge in the top right corner, highlighting a sale with bold text.
